sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ الْإِنْتَرْنِتُ الْمَصْدَرَ الْأَوَّلَ لِلْأَخْبَارِ فِي الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Internet je postao primarni izvor vijesti u svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: The internet has become the primary source of news in the world.

sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ النَّاسُ الْأَحْدَاثَ الْيَوْمِيَّةَ بِسُرْعَةٍ عَبْرَ التَّطْبِيقَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi brzo čitaju dnevne događaje putem aplikacija.
sentences.translationEn: People read daily events quickly through applications.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا التَّأَكُّدُ مِنْ صِحَّةِ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ قَبْلَ نَشْرِهَا.
sentences.translation: Moramo provjeriti tačnost informacija prije njihovog objavljivanja.
sentences.translationEn: We must verify the accuracy of information before publishing it.
